name: @vellumai/macos
description: Electron wrapper for the Vellum Assistant macOS app.

scripts.postinstall: node node_modules/electron/install.js && bun run scripts/install-file-deps.ts && bash scripts/build-mac-helper.sh
scripts.dev:standalone: bun run install:all && bun run scripts/reclaim-dev-port.ts && concurrently --kill-others --names web,electron --prefix-colors blue,green "bun run dev:web" "bun run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron-only: bun install && bun run prepare:electron-dev && electron-vite dev
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on --timeout 30000 http://localhost:5173 && bun run prepare:electron-dev && electron-vite dev
scripts.build:web: cd ../web && bun install && bun run openapi-ts && bun run build && cd ../macos && mkdir -p resources && rm -rf resources/web-dist && cp -R ../web/dist resources/web-dist
